---
title: "getting-started"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{getting-started}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(SeverityEstimate)
```

```{r sample data}
strata <- do.call(rbind, lapply(list(
  list(age = "youth",   ifr = 0.05, sir = 0.10, population = 1000L),
  list(age = "adult",   ifr = 0.10, sir = 0.25, population = 2000L),
  list(age = "senior",  ifr = 0.40, sir = 0.60, population = 1500L),
  list(age = "elderly", ifr = 0.80, sir = 0.90, population = 500L)
), as.data.frame))
times <- seq(as.Date("2024-01-01"), as.Date("2024-04-01"), "+7 days")
linelist <- SeverityEstimate::create_sample_linelist(
  strata, times, 0.15, 0.05, 0.95
)
linelist
```

```{r fit model}
estimate <- SeverityEstimate::estimate_severity(
  linelist,
  strata[, c("age", "population")],
  "detection",
  "outcome",
  time_period = "time",
  strata = "age",
  time_period_reference = times,
  strata_reference = strata[, "age"]
)
```

```{r underlying parameters}
SeverityEstimate::calculate_parameter_estimates(estimate, alpha = 0.05)
```

```{r severity estimates}
SeverityEstimate::calculate_fatality_ratio(estimate)
```
